KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT.title: Moonlit Night
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT.pages.INITIAL.des:
The waxing crescent moon gently illuminates the Spire's night. Just as you prepare to rest, the distant sound of two girls chatting and laughing catches your attention.

"Ah, good evening, friend. Is there something we can help you with?" The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] smiles sweetly.
"This Spire is quite interesting. Judging by your looks, you've been through a lot along the way." The [red]lady in red[/red] waves, inviting you over.
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT.pages.INITIAL.opt: Pay [red]{BuyDrinkCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a [gold]Dual Blessing[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT.pages.SHARE_STORI:
"Ironclads... Pact... Demon... [jitter]Kill![/jitter]" You barely manage to piece together these fragmented words.

"Sounds tough, man. Want one?" The [red]lady in red[/red] raises a hand to stoke the campfire, then offers you a cigarette.
"Didn't I tell you to smoke less?" The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] glares at her, then looks at you with a hint of worry. "My ability might make you feel a bit better."

In the next instant, you feel the weight of your [sine][red]blurred[/red][/sine] and [sine][red]painful[/red][/sine] memories lighten a little.

You remain silent.

"Not much of a talker? Understandable. I was like that for a long time too." The [red]lady in red[/red] shrugs.
"Still, I can sense that you have been through a great deal. Perhaps my ability can help ease your burden." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] looks at you gently.

In the next instant, you feel the weight of your [sine][green]distant[/green][/sine] and [sine][green]agonizing[/green][/sine] memories lighten a little.

"[sine]Splendid![/sine] Where should I even begin... I am [sine]the Heir to the Sun! The Forger of Order! The Pioneer of Fashion...[/sine]" You monologue for hours.

"How interesting. Haven't met someone like you in a while." The [red]lady in red[/red] listens with great amusement.
"Your ambitions are vast. Allow my ability to lend you a hand." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] slowly raises her hand.

In the next instant, you feel the weight of your [sine][orange]arrogant[/orange][/sine] and [sine][orange]prejudiced[/orange][/sine] memories lighten a little.

"I will [jitter]avenge[/jitter] my family! I will [jitter]slay[/jitter] him at the top of the Spire." [purple]Flames[/purple] flicker [jitter]violently[/jitter] around you.

"An endless cycle of revenge, huh." The [red]lady in red[/red] lets out a bitter laugh.
"Apologies, she isn't mocking you. Her experience is somewhat similar to yours." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] explains. "Perhaps my ability can help relieve some of your stress."

In the next instant, you feel the weight of your [sine][pink]obsessive[/pink][/sine] and [sine][pink]distorted[/pink][/sine] memories lighten a little.

[i][font_size=22]<explanatory beeps>[/font_size][/i]

"Uh, [blue]Keine[/blue], can you understand any of that?" The [red]lady in red[/red] asks while chuckling.
"I am not omniscient..." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] presses a hand to her forehead, looking a bit embarrassed. "But perhaps my ability can help you achieve your objective."

In the next instant, you register the size of your [sine][blue]corrupted[/blue][/sine] and [sine][blue]biased[/blue][/sine] memories shrink a little.

You share your bizarre tales of the Spire with the two ladies.

"Fascinating. Care to hear some stories of Gensokyo?" The [red]lady in red[/red] blows a smoke ring.
"Or perhaps a history lesson? The history of Gensokyo begins from..." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] chuckles. "Just kidding. Though, my ability might be of some help to you."

In the next instant, you feel the weight of your cluttered and disorganized memories lighten a little.
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT.pages.BUY_DRINK.d:
You bought some Sake from a nearby merchant to treat the two ladies.

"Yo~ thanks. Don't mind if I do." The [red]lady in red[/red] downs a bottle. "Solid. I didn't expect something with such a kick in a place like this."
"Slow down now." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] takes a small sip. "It is indeed quite nice. As a token of our thanks, please accept this."

You feel two distinct powers surging into your body.
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT_KEINE.pages.INITI:
The waxing crescent moon gently illuminates the Spire's night. Just as you prepare to rest, a familiar figure in the distance catches your attention.

"[red]Mokou[/red]! What are you doing here?" You laugh in surprise.
"Well if it isn't [blue]Keine[/blue]. Didn't expect to run into good luck in a place like this." [red]Mokou[/red] waves, inviting you to sit with her.
Pay [red]{BuyDrinkCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a [gold]Dual Blessing[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT_KEINE.pages.SHARE:
"And so I was saying... Hey, are you even listening?" You shake [red]Mokou[/red] in dissatisfaction.
"Hmm? Sorry, killed all sorts of bugs during the day, getting a bit sleepy at this hour." [red]Mokou[/red] yawns.
"You should have said so earlier, now go get a good rest. I'm getting sleepy too." You yawn contagiously. "Time to devour the history of today's fatigue."

In the next instant, you feel a wave of relief wash over you.

"What a convenient ability. Help me out too, will ya?"
"Alright, just lie down comfortably." You gently stroke [red]Mokou[/red]'s long, silvery hair.
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT_KEINE.pages.BUY_D:
You bought some Sake from a nearby merchant to treat [red]Mokou[/red].

"Buying me a drink out of your own accord? Is this my birthday? You usually nag me all day to drink less." [red]Mokou[/red] seems pleasantly surprised.
"Just think of it as a reward for your hard work. Wait, slow down!" You take a small sip as well.
"Pretty good. I didn't expect to find something with such a kick in a place like this." [red]Mokou[/red] downs another bottle. "As a token of my thanks, take this."

You feel a part of [red]Mokou[/red]'s power flow into your body, blending seamlessly with your own.
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT_MOKOU.pages.INITI:
The waxing crescent moon gently illuminates the Spire's night. Just as you prepare to rest, a familiar figure in the distance catches your attention.

"[red]Mokou[/red]! What are you doing here?" [blue]Keine[/blue] laughs in surprise.
"Well if it isn't [blue]Keine[/blue]. Didn't expect to run into good luck in a place like this." You wave, inviting her to sit with you.
Pay [red]{BuyDrinkCost}[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a [gold]Dual Blessing[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT_MOKOU.pages.SHARE:
"And so I was saying... Hey, are you even listening?" [blue]Keine[/blue] shakes your shoulder.
"Hmm? Sorry, killed all sorts of bugs during the day, getting a bit sleepy at this hour." You yawn.
"You should have said so earlier, now go get a good rest. I'm getting sleepy too." [blue]Keine[/blue] yawns contagiously. "Time to devour the history of today's fatigue."
"What a convenient ability. Help me out too, will ya?"
"Alright, just lie down comfortably." [blue]Keine[/blue] gently strokes your long, silvery-white hair.

In the next instant, you feel a wave of relief wash over you.
KEINEMOD-MOONLIT_NIGHT_MOKOU.pages.BUY_D:
You bought some Sake from a nearby merchant to treat [blue]Keine[/blue].

"Sake? Not bad I suppose. You can have some too, but make sure to drink slowly." [blue]Keine[/blue] takes a small sip. "Surprisingly good."
"Right? I didn't expect to find something with such a kick in a place like this." You start drinking heartily as well.
"Well then, as a token of my thanks, please take this."

You feel a part of [blue]Keine[/blue]'s power flow into your body, blending seamlessly with your own.
